values.pass: A legitimately admitted Teams bot remains active beyond the old 1.5-second false-eviction boundary and transcribes.

values.title: fix(gmeet): pre-admission Stop reaches withdraw path
values.pass: Stop during awaiting_admission reaches the bot, terminates the workload, and leaves durable typed control-plane truth.
values.observation: The stage control plane cleaned the lobby bot in about seven seconds. Meet's host-side knock prompt persisted for a while, so visible withdrawal remains #839 and is not claimed.

values.evidence: exact-head login.microsoftonline.com redirect fixture; external recurrence was not observed live

values.title: fix(gmeet): host denial beats ambient captcha
values.pass: An explicit host denial terminates permanently on the first poll without a solve loop or re-knock.
values.observation: The staged bot detected the explicit denial ahead of the ambient reCAPTCHA element, recorded awaiting_admission_rejected, and did not re-knock.

values.title: fix(gmeet): lobby liveness and typed pre-active failure
values.pass: The same unadmitted workload remains Running/Ready beyond the old 315-to-325-second reap boundary, then admits and transcribes.
values.observation: The staged bot survived 420 seconds and about 7.5 minutes total in the lobby, admitted into active, produced a real named-speaker transcript, and completed cleanly.
